violations.text: Dish washing area lacks a hand-sink. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2026
The hand-washing sink in the bathroom was lacking proper handwashing signage. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2026

The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2026
The toilet room lacks a covered receptacle. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2026

The walls in the ware washing area and beverage sink area are constructed of drywall. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2026

Inspector observed an accumulation of construction material outside of building. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2026
